page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, which provides a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. No local storage is bundled with this instance, and it lacks hardware GPU accelerators. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the instance sits primarily in the lower performance tiers for intensive workloads. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests place the instance in the bottom 25% tier, with scores of 1312.8 and 3490.35 respectively. Memory bandwidth tests show similar limitations, with read-only large block bandwidth at 25.0 GB/sec and write large block bandwidth at 21.81 GB/sec, both falling into the bottom 25% category. However, the CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 Foundation and AVX-512 Vector Neural Network Instructions (VNNI), which can accelerate specific vector and deep learning inference tasks.

In application-specific benchmarks, the instance demonstrates average performance in single-threaded bzip3 decompression at 8.93 GB/sec, though multi-threaded decompression drops to the bottom 10%. Database operations and Redis SET operations both rank in the bottom 25%. Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for entry-level compute-bound tasks, lightweight web serving, and basic batch processing workloads that do not require high memory density or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, running on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with no bundled local storage or GPU hardware. Baseline network bandwidth is rated at 2 Gbps. Benchmark results place the instance's CPU and memory performance mostly in the bottom 25% tier, though it maintains average single-threaded bzip3 decompression speeds. It supports AVX-512 and AVX-512_VNNI instruction sets. This instance is best suited for lightweight compute workloads, basic web serving, and simple batch processing tasks where dedicated CPU cores are required but memory demands remain low.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight dedicated compute workloads.

tagline: A dedicated compute instance featuring four Intel Xeon cores and a balanced two gigabytes of memory per core for lightweight workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 4 physical cores
8.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Support for AVX-512 and AVX-512_VNNI instruction sets
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage
Best suited for lightweight web serving, basic batch processing, and entry-level compute tasks
